The contact owns a 2019 Audi Q5. The contact stated that while driving at an undisclosed speed, the catastrophic transmission failure message was displayed and the vehicle inadvertently shifted into manual third gear. The vehicle was waiting to be towed. The dealer was made aware

narrative.headline: What 2019 Audi Q5 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 46 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (24% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
